---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement for CrowdCAD
title: ''
labels: enhancement
---

<!-- Please fill out the sections below to help maintainers evaluate your request. -->

## Summary

What problem are you trying to solve? Provide a short, descriptive summary of the feature.

## Motivation

Why is this feature useful? Who will benefit and how?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you propose. Keep it concrete (UI changes, new API endpoints, data model changes).

## Alternatives considered

List other solutions you considered and why they were not chosen.

## Mockups / Examples

Include sketches, example screenshots (link to external images if needed), or a brief UI flow.

## Acceptance criteria

- What does “done” look like? List measurable criteria to mark the feature complete.

## Implementation notes (optional)

- Suggested files, components, or areas to change (helpful for contributors).
- Any API/DB schema considerations.

## Priority

- Low / Medium / High — how important is this feature for the project roadmap?

## Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

Maintainers: Evan Passalacqua (`@evanqua`) and Ivan Zhang (`@iv-zhang`).

If this is security-sensitive, do not include details in the public issue — follow `SECURITY.md` and report via `support@crowdcad.org` or GitHub Security Advisories.
